meaning: International Amateur Athletic Federation 国际业余田径联合会
examples: The IAAF has responded by urging caution over the reports.
The IAAF could not be reached to confirm their spokesman's reported remarks.
Adding to the confusion, Athletics South Africa has denied the claim, insisting that it has not yet heard from the IAAF.
She also raced to bronze at the IAAF World Championship in Osaka, Japan in 2007.
Previous IOC statements have suggested that the IOC would follow suit with the IAAF.
